hero.headline: The AI photo booth that creates poetry & portraits at your event
hero.subheadline: The Poem Booth is an AI photo booth that transforms your photo into a personal poem or artwork — in seconds, at your event, inspired by real poets and artists.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Poem Booth — from hiring to technology.

q1.q: What exactly is the Poem Booth?
q1.a: The Poem Booth is an AI photo booth that transforms your photo into a personal poem, AI portrait or comedy roast. It features an open, elegant design (no enclosed box) that fits any event — from weddings to corporate parties.

q2.q: How does the Poem Booth work?
q2.a: Press the button, pose for the camera, and within 10-30 seconds our AI generates a personal poem, art portrait or roast based on your photo. Share the result instantly via QR code on your phone.

q3.q: Is the Poem Booth suitable for any type of event?
q3.a: Yes. The Poem Booth has been used at weddings, corporate events, festivals, trade shows, product launches, libraries and cultural events. Thanks to its sleek, open design it fits any setting.

q4.q: What languages does the Poem Booth support?
q4.a: By default the Poem Booth operates in English or Dutch. Additional languages (German, French, Italian and more) are available as an add-on.

q5.q: Where can I hire the Poem Booth?
q5.a: The Poem Booth is available in the Netherlands, Belgium, and across Europe from our Amsterdam hub. We also deliver to the US and worldwide on request. Contact us for availability.

q1.q: Can I brand the Poem Booth for my client?
q1.a: Yes. We offer branding options: you can add your client's logo or product to the generated artworks and prints. This is available as a flat-fee add-on.

q2.q: Can the style of poems or portraits be customized?
q2.a: Absolutely. We can customize the AI style to match the event theme — think specific poets, art movements or a custom tone-of-voice. This falls under our customization add-on.

q3.q: How does setup and logistics work?
q3.a: We handle complete setup and teardown. Setup takes about 1 hour, teardown 45 minutes. You only need to provide a power outlet (110V/230V) and stable Wi-Fi or Ethernet.

q4.q: Can the Poem Booth be hired for multiple days?
q4.a: Yes. We offer day rates with discounts from the second day onwards. Contact us for a custom quote for multi-day events.

q1.q: Is the Poem Booth suitable for a wedding?
q1.a: Absolutely — the Poem Booth is one of the most popular choices for weddings. Guests receive a personal poem or portrait as a keepsake. It's much more unique than a standard photo booth.

q2.q: How much space does the Poem Booth need?
q2.a: The Poem Booth requires a footprint of about 1.5m x 1.5m (5ft x 5ft). It can be placed both indoors and outdoors (shade required outdoors).

q3.q: Can guests share their result immediately?
q3.a: Yes. After generating your poem or portrait, a QR code appears that you scan directly with your phone. You'll have the result on your own device instantly.

q4.q: How much does it cost to hire the Poem Booth?
q4.a: The price depends on location and number of days. Check our rates section on this page or request a custom quote.

q1.q: What's the difference between the Portrait Edition and the Original Edition?
q1.a: The Portrait Edition creates an AI-generated art portrait from your photo (30 sec). The Original Edition generates a personal poem based on your photo (10 sec). Both produce unique, AI-generated artworks.

q2.a: The Roast Edition is our comedy mode: take a photo and our AI writes a hilarious, personalized roast within 15 seconds. Perfect for corporate parties, birthdays and team buildings.

q3.q: Can I combine multiple editions at one event?
q3.a: Yes, you can make multiple editions available at a single event. Guests then choose which experience they want. Contact us to discuss the options.

q4.q: Which poets and art styles is the AI based on?
q4.a: The AI is trained on and inspired by real poets and artists. For poems you can choose from various styles. For portraits we generate unique artworks in diverse art movements.
